prompt: Make button 'play' go to the next card when clicked. Attach the script.
Attach a script to button 'play' that pops up an answer dialog saying 'Hello'.
Wire button 'play' so clicking it puts the text 'started' into field 'score'.
Attach a script to button 'play' that toggles the visible property of image 'logo' on each click.
Create a new button named 'home' on the current card with a script that goes to card 'intro'.
Set the script of the current card so that when the card opens it puts the text 'welcome' into field 'shared_status'.
Give card 'intro' a closeCard handler that hides image 'logo' before leaving the card.
Replace the script of card 'intro' with one that has both an openCard handler showing field 'score' and a closeCard handler hiding it.
Attach a script to the 'title_bg' background that on openBackground puts the text 'ready' into field 'shared_status'.
Set the stack script so that on openStack a global named 'score' is initialized to 0.
Install a keyDown handler on the scene inside sprite area 'arena' that sets the velocityX of sprite 'player' to 250 when 'd' is pressed and to -250 when 'a' is pressed.
Install a beginContact handler on scene 'main' inside sprite area 'arena' that adds 10 to the score global when the other node's name is 'orb'.
Set a frameUpdate handler on the scene of sprite area 'playfield' that, every frame, adds 1 to the score global.
Attach a mouseUp script to sprite 'player' inside sprite area 'arena' that doubles its xScale.
Make field 'score' display 'updated' in the field below when its content changes.
Wire button 'play' so it sets the visible of image 'logo' to false, waits 1 second, then sets it back to true.
Set the current card's script so that on openCard it puts the name of button 'play' into field 'shared_status'.
On the scene of sprite area 'arena', install a frameUpdate handler that nudges sprite 'enemy' down by 2 pixels every frame.
Set the current card's script: on openCard hide image 'logo', then put 'go!' into field 'shared_status'.
Install a keyDown handler on scene 'main' of sprite area 'arena' that moves sprite 'player' 5 pixels in the direction matching the arrow key pressed (up/down/left/right).
